name: Scalloped Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat breadcrumbs with milk and margarine until the margarine melts.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and egg whites. Stir in the salt, pepper, onion (minced), parsley flakes, and tuna.
3. Gradually stir in hot milk and crumbs to combine.
4. Place the mixture in a casserole dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 165, fat 10gm, cholesterol 72mg, carbohydrate 14gm, sodium 452mg.
Exchanges: Bread 1, Meat 1, Fat 1.
